title: Runtime Automation
subtitle: DevAPI proof helpers
description: AI Studio module for local runtime proof automation: DevAPI client/CLI, native iteration helper, screenshots, video capture, PNG codec, pixel health, UI readability, and live-state capture matrices.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Runtime Automation module contract: local DevAPI client, screenshot capture, runtime proof helpers, pixel health, UI readability, and module boundaries.

children.title: nt-runtime-automation
children.description: Runtime Automation skill router for DevAPI discovery, native iteration, screenshots, recordings, pixel health, UI readability, and live-state evidence collection.

children.title: runtime-workflow-rules.md
children.description: Reference for runtime launch/reuse rhythm, evidence paths, shared AI Studio runtime helpers, and module boundaries.

children.title: devapi-pattern.md
children.description: Reference for DevAPI discovery, command metadata, UI/input, frame.wait sequencing, shared client usage, capture flow, and release gate boundaries.

children.title: visual-qa-checklist.md
children.description: Reference for collecting visual runtime evidence with screenshots, recordings, pixel health, readability checks, and stable-frame proof.

children.title: devapi_client.py
children.description: Synchronous Python harness for the game DevAPI TCP command bus, native launch/reuse, screenshot capture, frame waits, and recording helpers.

children.title: devapi_client_test.py
children.description: Regression tests for engine default DevAPI port handling and engine-native PNG capture payload decoding.

children.title: devapi_cli.py
children.description: Minimal JSON command-line client for the game DevAPI TCP command bus.

children.title: iterate.py
children.description: One-command native visual iteration loop: build if stale, launch/reuse game, capture screenshot, and run UI readability audit.

children.title: state_capture.py
children.description: Universal multi-state screenshot capture helper that writes game.live_state_acceptance_matrix evidence JSON.

children.title: state_capture_test.py
children.description: Tests for StateCapture coverage, debt, idempotent recapture, and review-tool shot arguments.

children.title: pixel_health.py
children.description: Lightweight PNG pixel-health checks for blank, flat, or malformed screenshot evidence.

children.title: ui_readability.py
children.description: UI/text readability zoom audit that crops and upscales screenshot bands and flags text-on-bright-background risks.

children.title: png_io.py
children.description: Dependency-free PNG encode/decode utility shared by capture, framebuffer conversion, and pixel health.

children.title: png_io_test.py
children.description: Tests for the dependency-free PNG codec.

children.title: capture_window.py
children.description: Windows window screenshot capture helper with PNG output.

children.title: capture_screen.ps1
children.description: PowerShell screenshot capture fallback for still screenshots.

children.title: record_screen_ffmpeg.ps1
children.description: PowerShell/ffmpeg screen recording helper for gameplay video evidence.
